description: Fix TypeScript errors in quantchat and quantmail backend tsconfigs. quantchat has 11 errors (missing @prisma/client module, implicit any types, type conversion issues in app-state.ts). quantmail has 30 errors (missing @prisma/client, implicit any, spread types, ApiResponse vs PaginatedResponse incompatibility). Since @prisma/client is not installable, fix by: 1) Creating a minimal type stub for PrismaClient in each app's backend types, 2) Fixing implicit any params, 3) Fixing type mismatches in app-state.ts and api-client.ts.
steps: For quantchat: Create apps/quantchat/backend/types/prisma-stub.d.ts that declares module '@prisma/client' with minimal types used by the services (Message, Conversation, ConversationMember, PrismaClient with transaction)
Fix apps/quantchat/backend/services/conversation.service.ts - Add types for 'tx' param (line 51) and 'm' param (line 106)
Fix apps/quantchat/backend/__tests__/e2e-message.service.test.ts - Fix 'format' property errors on crypto key objects
Fix apps/quantchat/src/mobile/app-state.ts - Fix type conversion between AppState and Record<string,unknown> using proper type assertions
For quantmail: Create apps/quantmail/backend/types/prisma-stub.d.ts with types for Email, Repository, Commit, Build, Contact, PrismaClient
Fix apps/quantmail/backend/routes/ci.ts - Add types for 'line' and 'index' params (line 118)
Fix apps/quantmail/backend/services/thread.service.ts - Add types for 'e' and 'id' params (lines 45, 115)
Fix apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/branch-protection.service.test.ts - Add missing required properties to test object
Fix apps/quantmail/src/mobile/app-state.ts - Same fix as quantchat version
Fix apps/quantmail/src/services/api-client.ts - Fix PaginatedResponse vs ApiResponse type mismatch by adding proper metadata type to ApiResponse or creating adapter functions
acceptance_criteria: NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --project apps/quantchat/tsconfig.backend.json reports zero errors
NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --project apps/quantmail/tsconfig.backend.json reports zero errors
All existing vitest tests still pass
findings: Both tsconfig.backend.json files compile with zero errors after creating Prisma type stubs and fixing all implicit any params, type assertions, and type mismatches. All 2770 tests pass. The ReviewComment interface needed 'filePath' (not 'path') and a Branch model delegate was needed for quantmail. The pre-commit hook requires NODE_OPTIONS='' to bypass proxy-bootstrap.js issue.
